steps.title: Match the coordinated verb
steps.content: The subject merchants performs two coordinated actions: exported wheat, gold, and salt and ______ other commodities. The second verb should match the past-tense form exported.

steps.title: Keep the verbs parallel
steps.content: Choice A is an infinitive, Choice B is a participial phrase, and Choice C is a present participle. The remaining choice is a simple past-tense verb parallel to exported. The answer is D.
